name: Mojhy Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the apples.
2. Remove stems and replace with wooden lollypop sticks stuck halfway into each apple.
3. In a deep saucepan, combine corn syrup, sugar, and water. Stir and cook over medium heat until dissolved and mixture boils.
4. Cook without stirring to soft crack stage (a small amount of the mixture separates into threads that are hard but not brittle when dropped in cold water; or candy thermometer registers 280°F). Remove from heat.
5. Add vanilla extract and stir only enough to mix.
6. Place pan over boiling water to keep syrup from thickening.
7. Dip apples and wind in a circular motion until thoroughly covered with syrup.
8. Place on buttered pans with sticks upright and cool.
Makes 6 Mojaj Apples.
